src/main/java/net/mmo/utils/kism/ui/util.why_exists: In Java 17+, using @Serial on serialVersionUID fields is recommended to suppress warnings about missing annotations and to explicitly mark the field as part of the serialization mechanism; while not strictly a compile error, it is part of the migration to modern Java standards.
